reviews.comment:
Me quedé asombrada con los precios del ypf full de ahí, por que en todas las ypf te matan con los precios. Casi nunca compramos en esos lugares por ese motivo, pero ahí, vale la pena comprar todo lo que necesites para tu viaje.

(Translated by Google)
I was amazed by the prices at the YPF Full station there, because all the other YPF stations are ridiculously expensive. We almost never shop there for that reason, but there, it's worth buying everything you need for your trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwM0ptQ0FREAE
